name: What if insurance denies my workers comp after ladder fall at work?

mainEntity.name: What if insurance denies my workers comp after ladder fall at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20-60 days with more evidence; get a lawyer.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Appeal the denial within your state's deadline, usually 20-60 days, by requesting a hearing.[2]

Common denial reasons include missed reporting or disputed injury severity; provide more evidence like doctor opinions.[3] Many denials overturn on appeal.

- Gather additional medical proof.
- File formal protest.
- Represented appeals succeed more.

Contact a workers' comp lawyer immediately; they handle paperwork and fights insurers.[1] Don't accept initial no.

description: Appeal within 20-60 days with more evidence; get a lawyer.[2]
